creator: newton.ja.terry@gmail.com
text:
The home page linked in the pkg-desc WWW: http://www.go-compiz.org has evidently a new owner. The URL is leading to a credit card and other financial informational page, hiding behind a Cloudflare captcha page.

https://svnweb.freebsd.org/ports/head/x11-wm/compiz/pkg-descr?view=markup

https://web.archive.org/web/20070117231502/http://www.go-compiz.org/index.php?title=Main_Page

There seems to be no other compiz web pages than the http://www.compiz.org/ and the development pages on Launchpad for the 0.9.x series: https://launchpad.net/compiz, on GitLab and GitHub the 0.8.x series: https://gitlab.com/compiz , https://github.com/compiz-reloaded.
